Do NOT write incident details as markdown in your response — always use this tool instead. Rendered below the collapsible sections. Do NOT include the title, details table, or structured section content here."},"peopleAndRoles":{"type":"array","description":"People involved in the incident and their roles.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"role":{"type":"string","description":"The role title (e.g. "Incident Commander")."},"people":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Full name of the person."},"email":{"type":"string","description":"Email address of the person, if available."}},"required":["name"]},"description":"People assigned to this role. Include email when available from the incident data."}},"required":["role","people"]}},"timelineAndMeasurements":{"type":"array","description":"Key timeline events or measurements related to the incident.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"label":{"type":"string","description":"Label for the entry (e.g. "Time to Detection")."},"value":{"type":"string","description":"Value for the entry (e.g. "12 minutes")."}},"required":["label","value"]}},"impactAndScope":{"type":"array","description":"Bullet points describing the impact and scope of the incident.","items":{"type":"string"}},"communicationsAndChannels":{"type":"array","description":"Communication channels and service links related to the incident.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Display name for the link (e.g. "Slack", "Zoom Bridge", "SAAS-19682")."},"url":{"type":"string","description":"URL of the communication channel or service."}},"required":["name","url"]}}}}},{"id":"selectFirehydrantIncident","description":"Select a Firehydrant incident to use for the next step. Can be a relative (e.g., "-1h", "-1d") or absolute timestamp as a unix time value in seconds (e.g. 1700511360).","default":"-1h"},"latest":{"type":["string","number"],"description":"Latest time for the search. Can be relative (e.g., "now", "-5m") or absolute timestamp as a unix time value in seconds (e.g. 1700511360).","default":"now"},"limit":{"type":"number","description":"Maximum number of events to return.","minimum":1,"maximum":1000,"default":10},"description":{"type":"string","description":"A description of the search that is about to be run","maxLength":100},"confirmBeforeRunning":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether to confirm with the user before running the search.","default":true}},"required":["query","description","confirmBeforeRunning"]}},{"id":"edit_notebook","description":"Save the investigation to a notebook with rich context.
